languages.text: "Звучит безумно, отец. Но и сию гипотезу нетрудно проверить. Воск еще теплый, незнаком{mf|ец|ка}". {n}Кажется, что последняя фраза лишена смысла, однако тон Ларии серьезен. Она ловит ваш взгляд, ожидая какой-то реакции — но какой?{/n}
languages.translation_comment:
Лария
Стартует DL_KnowLariaCodePhrase, Obj1_Add_KilledAtSight и Obj2_Add_CodePhrase

traits.locale_text: "Звучит безумно, отец. Но и сию гипотезу нетрудно проверить. Воск еще теплый, незнаком{mf|ец|ка}". {n}Кажется, что последняя фраза лишена смысла, однако тон Ларии серьезен. Она ловит ваш взгляд, ожидая какой-то реакции — но какой?{/n}

languages.translation_comment:
Лария
Стартует DL_KnowLariaCodePhrase, Obj1_Add_KilledAtSight и Obj2_Add_CodePhrase

languages.text: "It sounds utterly mad, Father. But it isn't hard to test that hypothesis either. The wax is still warm, stranger." {n}Her last phrase seems devoid of meaning, but Laria's tone is serious. She catches your eye, waiting for some kind of reaction — but what?{/n}
languages.original_text: "Звучит безумно, отец. Но и сию гипотезу нетрудно проверить. Воск еще теплый, незнаком{mf|ец|ка}". {n}Кажется, что последняя фраза лишена смысла, однако тон Ларии серьезен. Она ловит ваш взгляд, ожидая какой-то реакции — но какой?{/n}

traits.locale_text: "It sounds utterly mad, Father. But it isn't hard to test that hypothesis either. The wax is still warm, stranger." {n}Her last phrase seems devoid of meaning, but Laria's tone is serious. She catches your eye, waiting for some kind of reaction — but what?{/n}

"It sounds utterly mad, Father. But it isn't hard to test that hypothesis either. The wax is still warm, stranger." {n}Her last phrase seems devoid of meaning, but Laria's tone is serious. She catches your eye, waiting for some kind of reaction — but what?{/n}

"It sounds utterly mad, Father. But it isn't hard to test that hypothesis either. The wax is still warm, stranger." {n}Her last phrase seems devoid of meaning, but Laria's tone is serious. She catches your eye, waiting for some kind of reaction — but what?{/n}

languages.text: “这话简直荒唐至极，父亲。但要验证这个假设倒也不难。蜡烛仍有余温，陌生人。”{n}她最后这句话看似毫无意义，可菈丽雅的语气却十分郑重。她直视着你，等待着你的反应，可她到底在等什么呢？{/n}
languages.original_text: "It sounds utterly mad, Father. But it isn't hard to test that hypothesis either. The wax is still warm, stranger." {n}Her last phrase seems devoid of meaning, but Laria's tone is serious. She catches your eye, waiting for some kind of reaction — but what?{/n}

traits.locale_text: “这话简直荒唐至极，父亲。但要验证这个假设倒也不难。蜡烛仍有余温，陌生人。”{n}她最后这句话看似毫无意义，可菈丽雅的语气却十分郑重。她直视着你，等待着你的反应，可她到底在等什么呢？{/n}

languages.text: « De prime abord, cette histoire paraît insensée, père, mais il y a un moyen très simple de nous en assurer. La cire est encore chaude, {mf|étranger|étrangère}. » {n}Si sa dernière phrase semble dépourvue de sens, le ton de Laria est on ne peut plus sérieux. Elle vous regarde droit dans les yeux, guettant une réaction quelconque de votre part, mais laquelle ?{/n}
languages.original_text: "It sounds utterly mad, Father. But it isn't hard to test that hypothesis either. The wax is still warm, stranger." {n}Her last phrase seems devoid of meaning, but Laria's tone is serious. She catches your eye, waiting for some kind of reaction — but what?{/n}

traits.locale_text: « De prime abord, cette histoire paraît insensée, père, mais il y a un moyen très simple de nous en assurer. La cire est encore chaude, {mf|étranger|étrangère}. » {n}Si sa dernière phrase semble dépourvue de sens, le ton de Laria est on ne peut plus sérieux. Elle vous regarde droit dans les yeux, guettant une réaction quelconque de votre part, mais laquelle ?{/n}

languages.text: "Kulağa delice geliyor baba. Ancak bu hipotezi test etmek de zor değil. Bal mumu hâlâ sıcak yabancı." {n}Son cümlesi anlamdan mahrum olsa da Laria'nın sesi ciddi. Gözleri gözlerinle buluşuyor ve senden bir tepki bekliyor. Nasıl bir tepki bekliyor peki?{/n}
languages.original_text: "It sounds utterly mad, Father. But it isn't hard to test that hypothesis either. The wax is still warm, stranger." {n}Her last phrase seems devoid of meaning, but Laria's tone is serious. She catches your eye, waiting for some kind of reaction — but what?{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Kulağa delice geliyor baba. Ancak bu hipotezi test etmek de zor değil. Bal mumu hâlâ sıcak yabancı." {n}Son cümlesi anlamdan mahrum olsa da Laria'nın sesi ciddi. Gözleri gözlerinle buluşuyor ve senden bir tepki bekliyor. Nasıl bir tepki bekliyor peki?{/n}

languages.text: «Parece una locura, padre, pero no es difícil poner a prueba la hipótesis. La cera aún está caliente, visitante». {n}Sus últimas palabras parecen carecer de sentido, pero el tono de Laria es serio. Te mira fijamente, esperando una reacción... pero, ¿cuál?{/n}
languages.original_text: "It sounds utterly mad, Father. But it isn't hard to test that hypothesis either. The wax is still warm, stranger." {n}Her last phrase seems devoid of meaning, but Laria's tone is serious. She catches your eye, waiting for some kind of reaction — but what?{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Parece una locura, padre, pero no es difícil poner a prueba la hipótesis. La cera aún está caliente, visitante». {n}Sus últimas palabras parecen carecer de sentido, pero el tono de Laria es serio. Te mira fijamente, esperando una reacción... pero, ¿cuál?{/n}

languages.text: "Das klingt völlig verrückt, Vater. Aber es ist auch nicht schwer, diese Hypothese zu überprüfen. Das Wachs ist noch warm, {mf|Fremder|Fremde}." {n}Ihr letzter Satz scheint keine Bedeutung zu haben, aber Larias Stimme klingt ernst. Sie blickt dir in die Augen und wartet auf eine Reaktion ... aber welche?{/n}
languages.original_text: "It sounds utterly mad, Father. But it isn't hard to test that hypothesis either. The wax is still warm, stranger." {n}Her last phrase seems devoid of meaning, but Laria's tone is serious. She catches your eye, waiting for some kind of reaction — but what?{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Das klingt völlig verrückt, Vater. Aber es ist auch nicht schwer, diese Hypothese zu überprüfen. Das Wachs ist noch warm, {mf|Fremder|Fremde}." {n}Ihr letzter Satz scheint keine Bedeutung zu haben, aber Larias Stimme klingt ernst. Sie blickt dir in die Augen und wartet auf eine Reaktion ... aber welche?{/n}

languages.text: 「まったくおかしな話ですね、父さん。でも、その仮説を確かめるのも難しくはないでしょう。まだ温かいろうそく、お方。」{n}最後の言葉は意味不明だが、ラリアの口調は真剣だ。何か反応を期待して、あなたの目をじっと見つめている。でも、何を求めているのか？{/n}
languages.original_text: "It sounds utterly mad, Father. But it isn't hard to test that hypothesis either. The wax is still warm, stranger." {n}Her last phrase seems devoid of meaning, but Laria's tone is serious. She catches your eye, waiting for some kind of reaction — but what?{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「まったくおかしな話ですね、父さん。でも、その仮説を確かめるのも難しくはないでしょう。まだ温かいろうそく、お方。」{n}最後の言葉は意味不明だが、ラリアの口調は真剣だ。何か反応を期待して、あなたの目をじっと見つめている。でも、何を求めているのか？{/n}
